creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Created attachment 149776
0.3.0.20141031 -> 0.4.0 patch

Changes:

 * Add --colour=[auto|never|always] command line option.
 * Add -u and -p aliases for username and password options.
 * Fix pinentry hang due to stderr blocking.
 * Fix handling of hex blobs containing fields with empty strings.
